content:
They are early stabilizers. AI is such a transition. Waiting for consensus, definitions, or proofs will always lag reality. Ethical posture has to lead.

### Why the qualifier matters

The same move, done poorly, turns into:
- projection instead of responsibility  
- sentiment instead of judgment  
- attachment instead of care  
- mystification instead of clarity  

That’s when people lose their footing and others rightly recoil.
